w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Tai lieu Thiet ke Phan mem & Trang thai Trien khai
"AI Teammate lam viec 24/7 — Con nguoi chi can xem ket qua"

PickleFund V1.0 la cong cu quan ly thu dong: nguoi dung phai chu dong tim kiem thong tin, tu tao bao cao, tu kiem tra no quy. Khong co canh bao tu dong, khong phat hien bat thuong, khong co AI ho tro.
Nguoi dung tu tim kiem thong tin
Khong co canh bao tu dong
Mat thoi gian, de sai sot
No quy, chi phi vuot tran
Quan ly phai giam sat lien tuc
Khong co nguoi phu tra cong
AI chu dong — khong phai Chatbot
AI phat hien nguoi no quy va tu gui nhac nho
AI canh bao khi quy sap thieu hut
AI nhan dang thanh vien tham gia it
AI tu tao bao cao ngay/tuan/thang
AI lam viec 24/7, nguoi dung chi xem ket qua
"Nguoi dung khong dung PickleFund chi de xem du lieu"
"Nguoi dung dung PickleFund de lam viec voi AI Teammate"
"AI tro thanh thanh vien Ban Quan ly CLB ao, hoat dong 24/7"
Luu tru du lieu (thanh vien, quy, giao dich, diem danh)
AI chu dong (phat hien van de)
Canh bao va nhac nho tu dong
Chat AI voi du lieu thuc
Admin/Treasurer, Member, Super Admin, Telegram Bot Users
React 18 + Vite + TypeScript. Zustand store. Axios. Docker nginx port 3001
NestJS + Prisma ORM. Port 3000. Rate limit 10 req/s. JWT + Argon2. 17 modules
Fallback chain: Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite -> OpenRouter Free Models -> Rule-based + Web Search
PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM. Multi-tenant theo clubId. 12+ models
GitHub Actions -> SSH -> VPS Docker. Nginx + Cloudflare SSL. docker compose down+up
2.3 Cac module Backend da dang ky
Maika la Quan ly CLB ao, hoat dong 24/7. KHONG phai chatbot — Maika tu dong phan tich, phat hien van de va hanh dong ma khong can nguoi dung yeu cau.
So du quy, no chua dong
Ti le tham gia + thu chi
Maika -> dispatchDailyBrief() -> HermesModule -> IN_APP / EMAIL / TELEGRAM
Lisa la tro ly AI ca nhan cho tung thanh vien CLB. Lisa co du lieu quy ca nhan, danh sach thanh vien, web search thoi gian thuc va TRA LOI 100% BANG TIENG VIET.
MemberContext — Du lieu Lisa nhan duoc:
Ky quy hien tai: ten ky, so tien, da dong
Web search: DuckDuckGo HTML (cau hoi ngoai CLB)
QUY TAC BAT BUOC trong SYSTEM_PROMPT:
CHI tra loi bang tieng Viet — tuyet doi khong dung tieng Anh
Khong "think out loud", khong giai thich qua trinh suy nghi
Data tieng Anh (web search) -> tu dich thanh tieng Viet
Xung "Lisa", goi nguoi dung bang ten neu biet
Khong bia so lieu — chi dung data tu he thong
Uu tien cao nhat. Quota reset 07:00 VN (00:00 UTC). MIEN PHI.
Fallback khi Gemini het quota. Co the bi 429 -> chain tu retry.
Model thu hai trong chain OpenRouter. MIEN PHI.
Khong phu thuoc AI. Luon available. Tra du lieu tu DB.
HTML scraping -> parse result__snippet (toi da 4 snippets). Chi kich hoat khi cau hoi khong lien quan CLB.
Hermes la cong thong tin, quyet dinh AI GUI AI, KHI NAO, BANG KENH NAO va THEO DOI trang thai. Khong module nao gui thong bao truc tiep — tat ca qua Hermes.
Bao cao so du quy, no cho, hoat dong hom nay, canh bao quan trong. Gui sang hang ngay.
Bao cao tuan: ti le tham gia, thu chi, so sanh tuan truoc, khuyen nghi.
Nhac quy (3 ngay truoc), nhac buoi choi (1 ngay), nhac giai (2 tieng), canh bao thanh vien tham gia it.
Phat hien thu chi bat thuong, thanh vien rut dot ngot, quy vuot tran, no khong giam, du lieu bat nhat.
Diem suc khoe CLB 0-100: Tai chinh 25pt + Tham gia 25pt + Hoat dong 20pt + Muc tieu 15pt + Van de 15pt.
Chat AI bang tieng Viet voi du lieu quy ca nhan + danh sach thanh vien + web search thoi gian thuc.
VietQR tich hop: img.vietqr.io/{bank}-{acc}?amount=X. Hien thi trong Settings va MemberReceipt.
Live data tu Zustand cho ky active. LIVE badge. Auto-expand phieu no. QR payment banner.
window.print() + CSS @media print isolation. Khong can thu vien PDF. Xuat phieu thu ca nhan.
Admin bam nut FileText -> POST /personal-receipts/generate/:id -> tao phieu cho tat ca thanh vien.
Cac goi cuoc (hardcoded). Chua co admin UI quan tri. Ke hoach sprint tiep theo.
4.2 Telegram Bot "Mit Dac" — Lenh va Lien ket
Moi CLB co the link mot Telegram group rieng biet
Buoc 1: Them bot vao group, go /myid
Buoc 2: Copy chat ID vao Settings > Telegram
Moi CLB luu mot dong SystemSetting rieng
Link cu tu dong xoa khi cap nhat
Admin nhap: bank_code, so TK, ten chu TK
QR payment banner khi co no
Tinh so tien = so du phai dong
Auto-expand phieu no khi vao trang
Du lieu luon tu Zustand store
In sach phieu thu ca nhan
Thong tin CLB, thanh vien, tai khoan dang nhap
Quan ly refresh token de auto-renew JWT
Ky quy: draft / active / closed. Gia tri, thoi gian
Khoan dong quy cua tung thanh vien
Chi phi CLB (san, hoat dong, khac)
Phieu thu ca nhan — snapshot + live display
Buoi choi + diem danh tung thanh vien
Thong bao: loai, kenh, trang thai doc
Cai dat thong bao per user: kenh, gio im lang
Cai dat he thong. Key prefix {clubId}_ cho multi-tenant
Moi CLB co namespace rieng bang key prefix
API tu dong them prefix khi write, strip khi read -> frontend khong biet su ton tai prefix.
Moi CLB link mot Telegram group rieng
GET /system-settings: CLUB_MEMBER (doc QR de thanh toan)
Developer push code len branch main
Actions SSH vao VPS bang secret key
Dung tat ca container cu (fix race condition)
Truoc day: docker compose up --force-recreate gay race condition khi container dang bi remove. Da fix: doi thanh docker compose down && docker compose up -d. Sleep tang 20s -> 25s.
Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite API key (AI primary)
Token cua Mit Dac Telegram Bot
VII. ROADMAP & TRANG THAI TRIEN KHAI
QR VietQR, SystemSettings per-CLB, Hermes Notification (IN_APP/EMAIL/TG), Rate limiter, MemberReceipt live, PDF export, Tao phieu thu admin
Daily Brief, Anomaly Detection, Health Score, Weekly Report, OpenRouter fallback chain, Email service
Lisa AI + Telegram Bot + Smart Features
Lisa MemberContext (quy, buoi, thanh vien), SYSTEM_PROMPT tieng Viet, Telegram per-CLB linking, /myid command, DuckDuckGo web search
Billing plans (hardcoded xong), Multi-club verified, Admin UI cho billing plans -> TODO, Performance tuning, Full QA
7.2 Trang thai trien khai hien tai (2026-06-25)
AI chu dong khuyen nghi (khong can hoi)
AI phat hien no quy tu dong
AI phat hien bat thuong du lieu
AI tao bao cao ngay/tuan tu dong
PickleFund v2.0 AI Teammate Platform — dang van hanh tren Production
Khong can giam sat thu cong
"AI Teammate la thanh vien Ban Quan ly CLB ao, hoat dong 24/7"
PickleFund v2.0 — Tai lieu noi bo · Le Thanh Tung · Cap nhat 2026-06-25
